title: Incident Triage Classification
description: Schema readiness for incident triage classification, covering priority scoring, impact assessment, category assignment, and responder routing.

fields.name: priority_scoring_schema
fields.purpose: Schema for incident priority scoring based on severity and impact

fields.name: impact_assessment_schema
fields.purpose: Schema for assessing business and technical impact of incidents

fields.name: incident_category_taxonomy
fields.purpose: Taxonomy of incident categories for classification

fields.name: responder_routing_rules
fields.purpose: Rules for routing incidents to appropriate responders

fields.name: triage_decision_log_schema
fields.purpose: Schema for logging triage decisions and rationale

safety_notes: Schema readiness only. No real incident triage, no priority scoring execution, no responder routing. Triage remains non-functional until explicitly enabled.
